scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:libs: npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/events && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/database
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/gateway && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/auth-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/user-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/flow-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/messaging-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/campaign-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/analytics-service && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/shell-app && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/flow-builder-mf && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/campaign-manager-mf && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/user-manager-mf && npm run build --workspace @mockingbird/analytics-dashboard-mf
